description: Registry of reusable method atoms extracted from papers. Each atom is a composable building block for training recipes.

atom_schema.description: Schema for registering a method atom

required_fields.name: Human-readable name
required_fields.source_paper: arXiv ID or DOI of the originating paper
required_fields.category: One of: reward_shaping, data_curation, training_algorithm, evaluation, distillation
required_fields.description: What this atom contributes to a recipe
required_fields.recipe_fragment: Partial recipe JSON that gets merged when this atom is composed into a recipe

optional_fields.dependencies: List of other atom IDs this atom requires
optional_fields.conflicts: List of atom IDs incompatible with this atom
optional_fields.validated: Whether this atom has been tested in a real training run

atoms.name: Group Relative Policy Optimization
atoms.description: GRPO training with group-relative advantage normalization. No critic network needed — advantages computed within response groups.

atoms.name: Entropy-Aware Reward Shaping
atoms.description: Combines weighted test-pass reward with entropy bonus to prevent mode collapse during RL training.

atoms.name: Positive Trajectory Distillation
atoms.description: SFT on positive teacher trajectories followed by optional DPO pairwise refinement on chosen/rejected traces.

atoms.name: Length Penalty Reward
atoms.description: Penalizes overly verbose responses. Useful as a composite reward component to control output length.

atoms.name: Quality Score Data Filter
atoms.description: Filter training data by minimum quality score threshold. Applied during data loading.
